name: IronClad Heavy Equipment Solutions
description: IronClad Heavy Equipment Solutions provides specialized maintenance, repair, and support services for heavy machinery used in mining and industrial operations.

services.title: Heavy Equipment Maintenance
services.description: Preventative and corrective maintenance for mining and industrial machinery.

services.title: Mechanical Repairs
services.description: On-site and workshop repairs for heavy-duty mining equipment.

services.title: Hydraulic Systems
services.description: Diagnosis, repair, and servicing of hydraulic systems and components.

services.title: Fleet Management Support
services.description: Scheduled servicing and inspections to reduce equipment downtime.

services.title: Emergency Breakdown Response
services.description: Rapid-response repair services for critical equipment failures.
